{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9370547?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/maple3142", "id": 9370547, "login": "maple3142", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjkzNzA1NDc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/maple3142", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47760", "cvss": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact
TinyMCE 6.8.x contains an XSS vulnerability caused by improper SVG namespace scope handling in the sanitizer. A crafted payload using nested <svg> elements can bypass attribute sanitization and execute arbitrary JavaScript.

### Patches
This issue affects TinyMCE 6.8.x-7.0.x. The vulnerability is fixed in TinyMCE 7.1.0 and later.

### Workarounds
No official workaround available.

### Acknowledgements
Tiny thanks [maple3142](https://github.com/maple3142) (<https://maple3142.net>) of DEVCORE for their help identifying this vulnerability.

### References
Fix introduced in TinyMCE 7.1.0 though a rewrite of code causing the vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00191, "percentile": 0.0883}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T20:09:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47760"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T16:16:28Z", "published_at": "2026-06-05T20:09:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tinymce/tinymce/security/advisories/GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47760", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tinymce/tinymce/security-advisories/GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tinymce/tinymce", "summary": "TinyMCE Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability using sanitization bypass through nested SVGs", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T20:09:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh5m-5hw4-5c69", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "tinymce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.8.0, < 7.1.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "TinyMCE"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.8.0, < 7.1.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tinymce/tinymce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.8.0, < 7.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: TinyMCE Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability using sanitization bypass through nested SVGs
